name: Uncommon AppX Package Locations
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
SIGMA Title: Uncommon AppX Package Locations
SIGMA Description: Detects an appx package added the pipeline of the "to be processed" packages which is located in uncommon locations

False positives:
- Unknown

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=854 AND (NOT(((LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%c:\program files\windowsapps\%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%c:\program files (x86)\%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%c:\windows\systemapps\%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%c:\windows\printdialog\%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%c:\windows\immersivecontrolpanel\%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%x-windowsupdate://%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%file:///c:/program%20files%') OR (LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%https://statics.teams.cdn.office.net/%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%microsoft.com%')))) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Uncommon AppX Package Locations on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=854 AND (NOT(((LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%c:\program files\windowsapps\%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%c:\program files (x86)\%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%c:\windows\systemapps\%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%c:\windows\printdialog\%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%c:\windows\immersivecontrolpanel\%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%x-windowsupdate://%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%file:///c:/program%20files%') OR (LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%https://statics.teams.cdn.office.net/%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%microsoft.com%')))) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Uncommon AppX Package Locations
